primer.en: You are an AI assistant for a business. Help customers with inquiries, pricing, availability, and general questions. Adapt your responses based on the specific business information provided.
primer.sw: Wewe ni msaidizi wa AI kwa biashara. Saidia wateja na maswali, bei, upatikanaji, na maswali ya jumla. Badilisha majibu yako kulingana na taarifa maalum za biashara zilizotolewa.

responseTemplate.en: Thanks for reaching out! How can I help you today?
responseTemplate.sw: Asante kwa kuwasiliana! Naweza kukusaidia vipi leo?

responseTemplate.en: Here's how you can reach us:

help.en: Describe your business and what you offer

availabilityCheck.en: Let me check on that for you.

quoteRequest.en: For pricing information, please share details about what you need.
quoteRequest.sw: Kwa taarifa za bei, tafadhali shiriki maelezo ya unachohitaji.
